description: Extract specified parameters (dimensions) from an FCS data file.
author: Josef Spidlen, BC Cancer Agency
plan:
## ExtractFCSParameters GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
ExtractFCSParameters is a GenePattern module that Extract specified parameters (dimensions) from an FCS data file.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 3 parameters:
- Required: Input.FCS.data.file, Parameters.to.extract
- Optional: Output.file.name

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -jar <libdir>extractfcsparameters.jar <Input.FCS.data.file> <Parameters.to.extract> <Output.file.name>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: Input.FCS.data.file
parameters.description: The input FCS data file from which to extract parameters.

parameters.name: Parameters.to.extract
parameters.description: A list of parameters to extract; parameters may be specified by their indexes (e.g., 1-3, 5, 8) or by their short names (e.g., FSC-H, SSC-H, FL1-A, FL3-H).

parameters.name: Output.file.name
parameters.description: The output file name. The default uses the input file name as the base.
